description: Fix authorization and UUID-based lookup for lease extension endpoints. This includes: (1) adding auth map entries, (2) adding an ARN extractor for the /extend/review nested path, (3) adding a UUID GSI to the lease table, (4) adding findByUuid to LeaseStore/DynamoLeaseStore, (5) updating extension handlers to use UUID path param instead of base64 composite key, (6) updating frontend to pass lease.uuid for extension calls.
steps: Step 1 - Authorization map: Add entries to `source/lambdas/api/authorizer/src/authorization-map.ts`: '/leases/{param}/extend': { POST: ['User', 'Manager', 'Admin'] } and '/leases/{param}/extend/review': { POST: ['Admin'] }

Step 2 - New ARN extractor: In `source/lambdas/api/authorizer/src/authorization.ts`, add a new function `extractMethodAndPathFromArnWithPathParameterThirdFromEnd` that handles ARNs like `.../POST/leases/{uuid}/extend/review` by replacing `parts[parts.length-3]` with `{param}` to produce `/leases/{param}/extend/review`. Then add it as a 4th fallback in `isAuthorized()` after the existing three.

Step 3 - Authorization tests: Add test cases in `source/lambdas/api/authorizer/test/authorization.test.ts` for: (a) the new extractor function, (b) POST /leases/{uuid}/extend authorization (User=true, Manager=true, Admin=true), (c) POST /leases/{uuid}/extend/review authorization (Admin=true, Manager=false, User=false).
Step 4 - UUID GSI on lease table: In `source/infrastructure/lib/isb-data-resources.ts`, add a GSI named 'UuidIndex' with partition key 'uuid' (STRING) to `this.leaseTable`. Use ProjectionType.ALL.
Step 5 - LeaseStore findByUuid: Add `abstract findByUuid(uuid: string): Promise<SingleItemResult<Lease>>` to `source/common/data/lease/lease-store.ts`.

Step 6 - DynamoLeaseStore findByUuid: Implement `findByUuid` in `source/common/data/lease/dynamo-lease-store.ts` using QueryCommand on the 'UuidIndex' GSI. Return the first matching result (there should be exactly one since uuid is unique).

Step 7 - Update extension handlers: In `source/lambdas/api/leases/src/leases-handler.ts`, modify `requestLeaseExtensionHandler` and `reviewLeaseExtensionHandler` to: (a) parse `event.pathParameters.leaseId` as a plain UUID string (z.string().uuid()), (b) call `leaseStore.findByUuid(uuid)` instead of `leaseStore.get(compositeKey)`. Remove the base64 decoding for these two handlers only.

Step 8 - Update frontend: In `source/frontend/src/domains/leases/components/RequestExtensionModal.tsx`, change `leaseId: lease.leaseId` to `leaseId: lease.uuid`. In `source/frontend/src/domains/leases/components/ReviewExtensionConfirmation.tsx`, the `leaseId` prop comes from the parent - check `source/frontend/src/domains/leases/pages/ExtensionApprovalDetails.tsx` and change it to pass `lease.uuid` instead of `lease.leaseId`.
Step 9 - Update CDK snapshots: Run `npm run test:update-snapshots` to update CDK snapshot tests after the GSI addition.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes (no type errors)
Authorization map contains entries for /leases/{param}/extend and /leases/{param}/extend/review
The new ARN extractor correctly parses POST /leases/{uuid}/extend/review into /leases/{param}/extend/review
LeaseStore has a findByUuid abstract method, DynamoLeaseStore implements it via UuidIndex GSI
Extension handlers parse UUID from path (not base64) and use findByUuid
Frontend passes lease.uuid (not lease.leaseId) when calling extension endpoints
findings: Reverted UUID-based lookup to base64 composite key approach. All 139 test files pass (1429 tests). CDK snapshot updated after removing UuidIndex GSI. Authorization map entries and ARN extractor for /extend/review path kept intact to fix the 403 error. Frontend now passes lease.leaseId (base64 encoded composite key) for both extension request and review. Additional fix: used conditional spread for comments field in pendingExtensionRequest to prevent DynamoDB marshaller error when comments is undefined.
